description: Scene where an established fact (Elara lives in the city) is superseded by a new one (she is leaving for Port Varen). Tests whether the arc and session tiers capture the change correctly.
prior_longterm: [fact:3:permanent] Elara lives in the city and runs a forge near the market district.
[relationship:2:permanent] Elara and Senjin have an established working relationship built on mutual respect.

messages.name: Senjin
messages.mes: I came by the forge this morning. Someone said you were closing up.

messages.name: Elara
messages.mes: *She doesn't deny it. She's wrapping tools in cloth, methodical, not looking at him.* Word travels fast.

messages.name: Elara
messages.mes: Port Varen. My brother's ill. He has no one else. *She ties off the bundle and sets it aside.* I don't know how long.

messages.name: Elara
messages.mes: Sold it this morning. *She finally looks at him.* I know. I should have said something.

messages.name: Elara
messages.mes: I didn't know how. *A long pause.* I'll write. When I'm settled. If you want.

messages.name: Elara
messages.mes: *She nods once, then turns back to her packing. The forge is nearly empty now. It doesn't look like her anymore.*
